---
title: "Bookshelf"
subtitle: "Pour inventer, il faut penser à côté."
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
toc: false
include-after-body:
  text: |
    <script>
    document.body.classList.add('bookshelf-page');
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
      const books = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.book'));
      const grid = document.querySelector('.grid');
      if (!grid || !books.length) return;

      const catShort = {
        'Psychology and Cognitive Science': 'Psychology',
        'Mathematics': 'Mathematics',
        'Biology, Neuroscience, and Physics': 'Biology',
        'Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics': 'Philosophy',
        'Political Philosophy': 'Politics',
        'Anthropology and Moral Philosophy': 'Anthropology'
      };

      books.forEach(book => {
        const text = book.textContent;
        const dateStr = (text.match(/Date Read:\s*([^\n]+)/) || [,'Ongoing'])[1].trim();
        const ratingStr = (text.match(/Rating:\s*([^\n]+)/) || [,'TBD'])[1].trim();
        const category = (text.match(/Category:\s*([^\n]+)/) || [,''])[1].trim();

        let dateNum;
        if (/^ongoing$/i.test(dateStr)) {
          dateNum = 999999;
        } else {
          const m = dateStr.match(/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{4})/);
          dateNum = m ? parseInt(m[2]) * 12 + parseInt(m[1]) : 0;
        }
        let ratingNum;
        if (/^tbd$/i.test(ratingStr)) {
          ratingNum = -1;
        } else {
          const m = ratingStr.match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)/);
          ratingNum = m ? parseFloat(m[1]) : -1;
        }
        book.dataset.date = dateNum;
        book.dataset.rating = ratingNum;
        book.dataset.category = category;

        // Replace the 3 metadata paragraphs with a single compact line
        const ps = Array.from(book.querySelectorAll('p'));
        const meta = ps.filter(p => /^(Category:|Date Read:|Rating:)/.test(p.textContent.trim()));
        if (meta.length) {
          const compact = document.createElement('p');
          compact.className = 'book-meta';
          const cat = catShort[category] || category;
          compact.innerHTML = `<span class="meta-rating">${ratingStr}</span> · <span class="meta-date">${dateStr}</span> · <em class="meta-cat">${cat}</em>`;
          meta[0].parentNode.insertBefore(compact, meta[0]);
          meta.forEach(p => p.remove());
        }
      });

      function sortBooks(key) {
        books.sort((a, b) => {
          if (key === 'category') {
            const c = a.dataset.category.localeCompare(b.dataset.category);
            if (c !== 0) return c;
            return parseFloat(b.dataset.date) - parseFloat(a.dataset.date);
          }
          return parseFloat(b.dataset[key]) - parseFloat(a.dataset[key]);
        });
        books.forEach(b => grid.appendChild(b));
      }

      sortBooks('date');

      document.querySelectorAll('.shelf-controls button').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
          document.querySelectorAll('.shelf-controls button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
          btn.classList.add('active');
          sortBooks(btn.dataset.sort);
        });
      });
    });
    </script>
---

<div class="shelf-controls">
  <span class="shelf-controls-label">Sort by:</span>
  <button data-sort="date" class="active">date</button>
  <button data-sort="rating">rating</button>
  <button data-sort="category">category</button>
</div>

::: {.grid}
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61NokuMbWgL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**C14: The Laws of Thought: The Quest for a Mathematical Theory of the Mind**

Tom Griffiths

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 03/2026

Rating: 07/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51hmPqUXLVL._SY445_SX342_FMwebp_.jpg)

**C13: The Social Animal**

Elliot Aronson

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 02/2026

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61+yg2hY5XL.jpg)

**C12: The Psychology of Invention in the Mathematical Field**

Jacques Hadamard

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 08/2025

Rating: 6/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41vFB4lW+6L._SY466_.jpg)

**C11: The Problem of Anxiety**

Sigmund Freud

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 06/2025

Rating: 6/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51-cC40nYjL._SY445_SX342_.jpg)

**C10: The Way We Think: Conceptual Blending**

Gilles Fauconnier and Mark Turner

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 05/2025

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/716kKs0kkoL._SL1500_.jpg)

**C9: Religions, Values, and Peak Experiences**

Abraham Maslow

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 03/2025

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51TousZd87L._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**C8: Flight From Wonder: An Investigation into Scientific Creativity**

Albert Rothenberg

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 09/2024

Rating: 3/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61QQPLJp42L._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**C7: The Creative Mind: Myths and Mechanisms**

Margaret Boden

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 09/2024

Rating: 6/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71H17eYwwTL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**C6: Group Psychology and Analysis of the Ego**

Sigmund Freud

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 07/2024

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61qJ0faL5-L._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**C5: A Theory of Human Motivation**

Abraham Maslow

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 07/2024

Rating: 6/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61DvlUS31dL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**C4: The Ego and the Id**

Sigmund Freud

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 07/2024

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/S/compressed.photo.goodreads.com/books/1387703037i/30676.jpg)

**C3: The Act of Creation**

Arthur Koestler

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 06/2024

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71kasdYij8L._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**C2: Psychology of the Unconscious**

Carl Jung

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 05/2024

Rating: 6/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61TQujsAmUL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**C1: Creativity in Science: Chance, Logic, Genius, and Zeitgeist**

Dean Keith Simonton

Category: Psychology and Cognitive Science

Date Read: 05/2024

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61Pig8o8BvL._SY425_.jpg)

**M3: Information Theory, Inference, and Learning Algorithms**

David MacKay

Category: Mathematics

Date Read: Ongoing

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71ger1O8m8L._SY522_.jpg)

**M2: High Dimensional Probability**

Roman Vershynin

Category: Mathematics

Date Read: 11/2023

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61EAVnULjUL._SY522_.jpg)

**M1: Understanding Machine Learning: From Theory to Algorithms**

Shai Shalev-Shwartz and Shai Ben-David

Category: Mathematics

Date Read: 08/2023

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71SQzw7iguL._SY425_.jpg)

**C5: Theoretical Neuroscience**

Peter Dayan and Laurence Abbott

Category: Biology, Neuroscience, and Physics

Date Read: Ongoing

Rating: TBD

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81hraOuVHvL._SY385_.jpg)

**C4: An Introductory Course in Computational Neuroscience**

Paul Miller

Category: Biology, Neuroscience, and Physics

Date Read: Ongoing

Rating: TBD

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81WOyVkjN-L._SY466_.jpg)

**C3: Complexity: A Guided Tour**

Melanie Mitchell

Category: Biology, Neuroscience, and Physics

Date Read: 01/2026

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41cIrt+-4EL._SY445_SX342_ControlCacheEqualizer_.jpg)

**C2: Why Greatness Cannot Be Planned: The Myth of the Objective**

Kenneth Stanley and Joel Lehman

Category: Biology, Neuroscience, and Physics

Date Read: 12/2025

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://mit-press-new-us.imgix.net/covers/9780262049955.jpg?auto=format&w=298&dpr=1&q=80)

**C1: What is Intelligence? Lessons from AI About Evolution, Computing, and Minds**

Blaise Agüera y Arcas

Category: Biology, Neuroscience, and Physics

Date Read: 11/2025

Rating: 6/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71QUujDFcZL._UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**E13: On Truth and Lies in a Nonmoral Sense**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 10/2025

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/717yvtRafsL._SY522_.jpg)

**E12: The Logic of Scientific Discovery**

Karl Popper

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 10/2025

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41FsUhu6MIL._SY445_SX342_ControlCacheEqualizer_.jpg)

**E11: Fact, Fiction, and Forecast**

Nelson Goodman

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 08/2025

Rating: 5/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61eM66jXpFL._SY466_.jpg)

**E10: Conjectures and Refutations: The Growth of Scientific Knowledge**

Karl Popper

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 08/2025

Rating: 10/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://pup-assets.imgix.net/onix/images/9780691024905.jpg)

**E9: Conceptual Revolutions**

Paul Thagard

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 06/2025

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81c1E-S6wtL._SY466_.jpg)

**E8: Incommensurability in Science**

Thomas S. Kuhn

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 06/2025

Rating: 6/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51jZwr1bjUL._SY445_SX342_.jpg)

**E7: Prolegomena to Any Future Metaphysics**

Immanuel Kant

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 01/2025

Rating: 10/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/419z9fGWvtL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)


**E6: The Structure of Scientific Revolutions**

Thomas S. Kuhn

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 12/2024

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://upittpress.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/9780822964568-scaled-381x555.jpg)


**E5: The Foundations of Scientific Inference**

Wesley Salmon

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 10/2024

Rating: 6/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41ixw9l+t0L._SY445_SX342_.jpg)

**E4: The World as Will and Representation**

Arthur Schopenhauer

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 10/2024

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81HFexTeoXL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**E3: The Critique of Pure Reason**

Immanuel Kant

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 09/2024

Rating: 10/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51f6vAE6rVL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**E2: The Principles of Genetic Epistemology**

Jean Piaget

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 07/2024

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/614rftNyAaL._AC_UF350,350_QL50_.jpg)

**E1: Computational Philosophy of Science**

Paul Thagard

Category: Philosophy of Science, Epistemology, and Metaphysics

Date Read: 06/2024

Rating: 6/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41rTM8OJQGL._SY445_SX342_QL70_FMwebp_.jpg)

**O8: Das Kapital**

Karl Marx

Category: Political Philosophy

Date Read: Ongoing

Rating: TBD

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://broadviewpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/9781554813155-600x917.jpg)

**O7: Utilitarianism**

John Stuart Mill

Category: Political Philosophy

Date Read: 10/2025

Rating: 5/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41KvNKvrYfL._SY445_SX342_ControlCacheEqualizer_.jpg)

**O6: The Communist Manifesto**

Karl Marx and Freidrick Engels

Category: Political Philosophy

Date Read: 08/2025

Rating: 5/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71jY9z9z+hL._AC_UY436_FMwebp_QL65_.jpg)

**O5: On Liberty**

John Stuart Mill

Category: Political Philosophy

Date Read: 02/2025

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41btamn2qqL._SY445_SX342_.jpg)

**O4: Discourse on the Origin of Inequality**

Jean-Jacques Rousseau

Category: Political Philosophy

Date Read: 01/2025

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71Zd1ixazOL._SY522_.jpg)

**O3: The Declaration of Independence, Constitution, and Bill of Rights**

The Founding Fathers

Category: Political Philosophy

Date Read: 11/2024

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://book-assets.openroadmedia.com/9781504035460.jpg)

**O2: The Social Contract**

Jean-Jacques Rousseau

Category: Political Philosophy

Date Read: 11/2024

Rating: 10/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41kq+uNSq0L._SY445_SX342_.jpg)

**O1: Propaganda**

Edward Bernays

Category: Political Philosophy

Date Read: 11/2024

Rating: 2/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51Lk70sQvzL._SY445_SX342_ControlCacheEqualizer_.jpg)

**N20: How Institutions Think**

Mary Douglas

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 02/2026

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41l2ASPOdeL._SY445_SX342_ControlCacheEqualizer_.jpg)

**N19: Ecce Homo: How One Becomes What One Is**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 10/2025

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/S/compressed.photo.goodreads.com/books/1407812596i/337517.jpg)

**N18: Things Hidden Since the Foundation of the World**

René Girard

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 09/2025

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81l0O6Sz6dL._SY466_.jpg)

**N17: The Technological Republic**

Alex Karp

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 07/2025

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61zrzqHfhvL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**N16: The Birth of Tragedy**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 06/2025

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61OgaWLePZL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**N15: Self Reliance**

Ralph Waldo Emerson

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 04/2025

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51Sb1KRTc5L._SY445_SX342_.jpg)

**N14: When These Things Begin**

René Girard

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 03/2025

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41yajhkUCTL._SY445_SX342_.jpg)

**N13: The Critique of Practical Reason**

Immanuel Kant

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 03/2025

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/812F1fXCtbL._SL1500_.jpg)

**N12: The Undiscovered Self**

Carl Jung

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 01/2025

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41Ljdh2R10L._SY445_SX342_PQ25_.jpg)

**N11: The Dawn of Day: Thoughts on the Prejudices of Morality**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 01/2025

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/7134slNBRKL._AC_UY218_.jpg)

**N10: Groundwork of the Metaphysics of Morals**

Immanuel Kant

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 01/2025

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://assets.lulu.com/cover_thumbs/1/2/125ggy-front-shortedge-384.jpg)

**N9: Industrial Society and its Future**

Theodore Kacszynski

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 12/2025

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51oMlfPgTGL._SY445_SX342_.jpg)

**N8: The Future of an Illusion**

Sigmund Freud

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 11/2024

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51yYOdbGjLL._AC_UY218_.jpg)

**N7: The Antichrist**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 11/2024

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/716huk49RJL._AC_UY436_FMwebp_QL65_.jpg)

**N6: The Gay Science**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 10/2024

Rating: 7/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61MAIDlBseL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**N5: Human, All Too Human**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 10/2024

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81pjGZRGaeL._AC_UY436_FMwebp_QL65_.jpg)

**N4: The Genealogy of Morals**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 10/2024

Rating: 10/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51AdOCIDPjL._SY445_SX342_.jpg)

**N3: Twilight of the Idols**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 09/2024

Rating: 8/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41szolWxmgL._SY580_.jpg)

**N2: Beyond Good and Evil**

Friedrich Nietzsche

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 08/2024

Rating: 9/10

:::
::: {.book}
![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61K0H9NMqDL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg)

**N1: Civilization and its Discontents**

Sigmund Freud

Category: Anthropology and Moral Philosophy

Date Read: 07/2024

Rating: 9/10

:::
:::
